changed: Moved mobile public search opening into the shared navbar and rendered the mobile search row under the sticky header.
Made the page-level public search form desktop-only.
Removed automatic compact-feed append on scroll and kept explicit load-more behavior.
Reduced notion autosave debounce and surfaced saving state immediately.
Added a short TTL cache for authenticated session preflight before repeated CSRF mutations.
notChanged: Preview/card surfaces still use excerpt rather than full body by design.
Desktop pagination behavior was left intact.
Notion autosave still uses the existing full blog update API.

validations.command: npx vitest run src/test/navbar-mobile-nav.test.tsx src/test/public-responsive-feed.test.tsx src/test/blog-notion-workspace.test.tsx src/test/auth-csrf.test.ts

PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npx playwright test tests/mobile-public-navigation.spec.ts tests/public-blog-pagination.spec.ts tests/public-works-pagination.spec.ts tests/ui-admin-notion-autosave-info.spec.ts --workers=1

risks: Authenticated-session TTL caching may delay redirect by one mutation request compared with strict preflight on expired sessions.
The excerpt-versus-body preview policy may still need a product decision later.
Playwright internal webServer configuration still assumes localhost:8080 and was bypassed with external-server mode for this validation.
recommendation: Accept this pass; next, split notion autosave to a content-only backend path if more latency reduction is needed.
